brief.name: HubSpot Spotlight fall 2026 reveal — copy-first hero

slots.name: meta
slots.copy: Oct 8, 2026 · 9:00 AM ET · Streamed live · Free

slots.name: subheading
slots.copy: HubSpot's fall reveal — watch Breeze agents and hundreds of Hub updates ship, live.

copy.caption: 90 minutes across Marketing, Sales, Service, Content, Data and Commerce Hub — and Smart CRM.

rationale: Copy-first event opener built on the hero-event-meta-forward genre archetype: the logistics meta row leads as the news register (date carries the urgency, so no countdown or NEW badge), the single-word event name 'Spotlight' takes the hero tier in the brand's own display face (ink on the cream raised band — no accent text off dark surfaces, no wordmark raster), the promise sits directly beneath, then a register action pair with one primary ('Save my seat') and a quiet ghost sibling ('See the fall lineup') honoring AS-59. The agenda rail lands below the actions in the brand's real product marks (six Hub webp icons via logo-bar, satisfying never-text-logos) at caption weight so it never outshouts the name. surfaceIntent 'raised' is the copy plan's warm cream band, a licensed roster surface not yet used across sibling heroes. No atmosphere media, no text-on-media treatment needed; orange stays confined to the primary button and the Hub marks. Adapt of the project hero family recomposed to the meta-forward archetype; footer omitted per the hard rule.
